name: svguitar
when_to_use: 需要把逐弦品位、空弦/闷弦与横按精确画成标准 SVG 吉他和弦图时用它,而非 ASCII 或手写 SVG——原生手写在品格几何、横按、指法标签和横竖布局上失败;它非做和弦识别、音频播放或完整 tab 谱。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能给出约 50% 可用的 ASCII 和弦图,易把弦序、品位和横按画错,也没有标准视觉比例;该库直接消费结构化指法并稳定生成 SVG。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to draw per-string frets, open or muted strings, and barres precisely as a standard SVG guitar chord diagram instead of ASCII or hand-written SVG. Native implementations fail on fret geometry, barres, fingering labels, and vertical or horizontal layout. It is not for chord recognition, audio playback, or complete tablature.
en.why_valuable: AI can only produce an approximately 50% usable ASCII chord diagram by default, often drawing string order, frets, and barres incorrectly, with no standard visual proportions. This library consumes structured fingering directly and reliably generates SVG.

data_in.note: Input is a per-string x fret grid, not only a chord name. The same chord name can have multiple fingerings, so consuming AI must specify fingers/barres.

chord.fingers: [string:number, fret:number|0|'x', labelOrOptions?:string|{text?:string,color?:string,textColor?:string}][] - string is 1-based; 0 means open and 'x' means muted
chord.title?: string - diagram title, hidden by default

config?.strings?: positive integer - number of strings, default 6
config?.frets?: positive integer - number of visible frets, default 4

spec.note: boot gives the SVG container a fixed height of 360px and width of 320px. AI may override with fixed px values; do not use vh or percentage heights. The SVG has its own viewBox, and narrow containers may use max-width:100%.

data_in.note: 输入是逐弦×品位 grid,不是只给和弦名;同名和弦可有多种指法,消费 AI 必须明确 fingers/barres。

chord.fingers: [string:number, fret:number|0|'x', labelOrOptions?:string|{text?:string,color?:string,textColor?:string}][] —— string 从 1 起;0=空弦,'x'=不弹
chord.title?: string —— 图标题,默认不显示
chord.position?: positive integer —— 起始品位,默认 1

config?.frets?: positive integer —— 显示品数,默认 4

spec.note: boot 给 SVG 容器固定 360px 高与 320px 宽;AI 可用固定 px 覆盖,禁 vh/百分比高。SVG 自带 viewBox,窄容器可设 max-width:100%。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):ESM import jsDelivr /npm/ + new SVGuitarChord(el).configure(...).chord(...).draw()。

example._why: 逐弦索引、0/'x' 与横按对象容易混淆,结构化 grid 需 minimal 校准。

carriers.widget: supported:构造器直接接 shadow 内 HTMLElement,输出容器内 SVG,无 CSS/font/uplink

isolation.evidence: svguitar.d.ts constructor takes an HTMLElement directly (no global selector needed); renders SVG (via svg.js/rough.js) into that supplied container. No document.head style injection, no body portal, no window/document listeners — one-shot static SVG draw. Fully in-shadow.
